label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 9

extraction.one_line_summary: KÄMNA Lennard soloed to victory from breakaway on final climb with 4.8km remaining after organizers moved GC finish line 2km earlier due to mud.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma accidentally went forward with six riders in early move, forcing peloton chaos before order restored 15km later.
Organizers moving GC finish 2km early eliminated bonus second importance, reducing peloton urgency to chase breakaway significantly.
Bora sacrificed Kämna chase duty to protect Vlasov's GC position by creating time gaps in crosswinds alongside Jumbo.
Vlasov attacked for bonus seconds at GC finish despite being outside top-10, revealing tight time margins anticipated in standings.

rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: positive: Attacked with 4.8km on 20-23% gradients after already being in long break, completing grand tour stage win trilogy
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Lenny: negative: Former leader caught out badly in crosswind splits despite having Groupama-FDJ teammates present
rider_signals.VLASOV Alexander: positive: Actively hunting bonus seconds outside top-10, suggesting team sees him as viable podium contender post-time trial
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: Tested Roglič on final climb despite GC finish being declared earlier, maintaining aggression before rest day
